name: hope
description: Understand GitHub pull requests with evidence-linked Hope reviews and shared language and theme settings. Requires Node.js 20 or newer.

interface.shortDescription: Understand a pull request before deciding
interface.longDescription: Hope explains one exact GitHub pull-request snapshot as a private, evidence-linked, self-contained HTML review. Codex and Claude Code share the same feature runtime, language settings, themes, and product contract.
defaultPrompt: Use $hope:diff to explain the current pull request.
